# programs.mercurial

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.mercurial`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ---------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.mercurial.aliases` | `attribute set of anything` | Mercurial aliases to define. |
| `programs.mercurial.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Mercurial. |
| `programs.mercurial.extraConfig` | `(attribute set of anything) or strings concatenated with “\n”` | Additional configuration to add. |
| `programs.mercurial.ignores` | `list of string` | List of globs for files to be globally ignored. |
| `programs.mercurial.ignoresRegexp` | `list of string` | List of regular expressions for files to be globally ignored. |
| `programs.mercurial.iniContent` | | |
| `programs.mercurial.package` | `package` | The mercurial package to use. |
| `programs.mercurial.userEmail` | `string` | Default user email to use. |
| `programs.mercurial.userName` | `string` | Default user name to use. |
